Variables.Name: CDLODMeshOverrideMaterial
Variables.Description: The material used to rendering ocean

Variables.Name: WaveFadeDistance
Variables.Description: . amplitude of wave have to fade as 0 for edge quads,this is the fade radius

Variables.Name: FFTSampleSize
Variables.Description: . FFT texture sampled by world position, used as  normalize sample position

Variables.Name: FFTFoamBlurNormalZ
Variables.Description:
. X influence the foam shape
	. Y : Z of normal vector of FFT wave, at this moment this normal vector haven't be normalize, after z setted, normal vector will be normalized

Variables.Name: GerstnerFFTSoftness
Variables.Description:
GerstnerFFTSoftness holds two waves blend factor in near sea
	 .X is Gerstner blend factor, if bigger than 1, wave fade rapidly
	 .Y is FFT blend factor, if smaller than 1, wave fade slowly
